Awards & Recognition

Elevance Health and Elevance Health Foundation are proud of the recognition we have received for our programs and practices that improve lives and communities.

  • 100 Companies That Care
    People, 2021—2022, 2024—2025
  • America’s Most JUST Companies
    JUST Capital, 2018—2025
  • Dow Jones Sustainability Index
    S&P SAM, 2018—2024
  • FTSE4Good Index
    FTSE Russell, 2019—2025
  • Leadership Partner
    Visionary Partner
    Feeding America, 2019—2025
  • The Civic 50
    Points of Light, 2019—2025
  • World’s Most Admired Companies
    Fortune, 2019—2025
